problem: CLI library module is fully implemented with list, show, comments list, and comments post commands. Merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts is already resolved (no markers). CLI itself appears feature-complete for the ticket scope. No changes needed from the continuation context user feedback (issues #1-#6 are all client/server concerns).

files.why: Module router dispatching to list, show, comments subcommands.
hlx library list — lists library items with ID, title, status, date.
hlx library show <ref> — shows report with section headings annotated with [slug] and comment summaries.
Nested router for comments subcommands (list, post).
hlx library comments list <ref> — lists comments grouped by section.
hlx library comments post <ref> — posts section rating with optional text.
Multi-format item resolution (CUID, ticket short ID, title match).
Agent discoverability documentation. Library section with all commands documented.
Was listed in merge-conflicts.json but has no conflict markers — already resolved. Unrelated to library feature.

facts: All 6 new library module files exist and are complete.
SKILL.md has Library section documenting all commands with examples (lines 48-51, 147-179).
resolve-library-item.ts supports CUID, ticket short ID, and title match resolution.
comments-post.ts supports --section (slug or heading text), --rating (thumbs-up/down/love), --reply-to flags.
Merge conflict in src/tickets/index.ts — listed in merge-conflicts.json but no conflict markers found — already resolved.
User's 6 continuation feedback items (#1-#6) are all client/server UX concerns — CLI is not directly affected.
